headline: P&L exposure: ₹56.1 Cr direct valuation benefit (engine estimate) + ₹40.1 Cr indirect via margin and green finance (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E multiple expansion potential of 0.1x, with a total valuation uplift of ₹96.2 Cr (engine estimate) and margin improvement of 10 bps.
Lower cost of capital by 10 bps and improved credit availability, with a direct benefit of ₹56.1 Cr (engine estimate) and potential for further ESG fund inflows.
Triggers BRSR (SEBI), GRI, ESRS, and DJSI frameworks; aligns with mandatory disclosure requirements, reducing regulatory scrutiny and risk of trading restrictions.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹56.1 Cr direct valuation benefit (engine estimate) + ₹40.1 Cr indirect via margin and green finance (engine estimate)
